basic_details.job_title: CMHO Rajnandgaon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 332 MPW, Nursing officer/ Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the Chief Medical & Health Officer (CMHO), District Rajnandgaon (Chhattisgarh) has released an official advertisement for 22 different contractual positions under the National Health Mission (NHM).

important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified separately on the official website

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid by scanning the QR Code provided in the official notification. UPI ID: 9340138300@idfcbank.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years. Maximum Age: 70 years for medical posts; 64 years for managerial posts. Age is calculated as of January 1, 2026. | Contract Period: Up to March 31, 2027, extendable based on satisfactory performance evaluation. The contract will automatically terminate upon regular recruitment to the post.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications specified for each post: | Nursing Officer / Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with valid CG Nursing Council registration, OR GNM with valid CG Nursing Council registration. ANM: 12th passed + ANM trained + INC affiliated training centre + live registration in CG Nursing Registration Council. District Account Assistant: B.Com (minimum 55%) + 1-year Computer Diploma (PGDCA); Tally knowledge compulsory. City Accountant: M.Com (Regular, 50%) with Tally 9.0, OR B.Com (Regular, 50%) with Tally 9.0. Block Manager – Account: B.Com (minimum 55%) + 1-year Computer Diploma (PGDCA) + Tally knowledge. Secretarial Assistant / Jr. Sr. Secretary Assistant: 12th passed from recognized institution + 1-year Diploma in Computer Applications. Counselor: PG Degree / Diploma in Psychology / Counselling / Health Education / Mass Communication / Social Science. Radiographer: 12th (Science) + Radiographer/X-Ray Technician Paramedical course from CG Govt. recognized institution + valid CG Paramedical Council registration. MO – AYUSH: BHMS / BAMS / BUMS Degree with registration from GOI recognized Ayush/Homeo/Unani Registration Board. RMA: PMHM (Practitioner in Modern and Holistic Medicine) course passed and registered with Chhattisgarh Medical Board. Pharmacist: B.Pharma OR D.Pharma with valid CG Pharmacy Council registration. OT Technician: 12th (Biology, Chemistry, Physics) + OT Technician Paramedical course + valid CG Paramedical Council registration. Dental Assistant: Matriculation from recognized institution + 2 years experience in dental college/clinic (Govt. health facility preferred); preference for 1-year lab technician / dental technician course. Feeding Demonstrator: BSc Home Science. Physiotherapist: Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy (B.P.T). Audiologist: Bachelor of Audiology & Speech Language Pathology (BASLP) / B.Sc. (Speech and Hearing) from an RCI recognized institute. Community Health Officer: Certificate Course in Community Health (B.Sc. Nursing Community Health Integrated Course) with valid CG Nursing Council registration, OR Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing Certificate in Community Health Integrated Course with valid CG Nursing Council registration. Social Worker (NMHP): M.Phil in Psychiatric Social Work preferred; otherwise Master of Social Work (Regular) preferred. MPW (Male) – UHWC: 12th (Biology) + Multipurpose Health Worker training (1 year formal or equivalent) recognized by CG Govt. + valid CG Paramedical Council registration. Senior Treatment Supervisor (STS): Bachelor's Degree OR recognized Sanitary Inspector course + Computer Operation Certificate (minimum 2 months) + permanent two-wheeler driving licence. Attendant (HA/SA): 12th Pass. Class IV / Aya Bai / Cook cum Caretaker: 8th Pass.

salary_details.6: Secretarial Assistant / Jr. / Sr. Secretary Assistant
salary_details.22: Class IV / Aya Bai / Cook cum Caretaker
salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online registration process as follows:
Register using your mobile number. Registration number and password will be sent to your mobile.
Log in using the registration number and password, then fill in the complete online application form.
Pay the application fee by scanning the QR Code provided and enter the Transaction ID in the application form.
After final submission, take a printout of the application, sign it, and upload the self-signed copy. Applications without self-signed uploads will not be accepted.
Retain the payment receipt printout for document verification purposes.

All required documents (educational qualifications, caste, domicile, disability, council registration, experience) must be entered accurately. Experience certificates must be uploaded in the application.

faq.question: Q1. What is CMHO Rajnandgaon Recruitment 2026 under NHM?
faq.answer: CMHO Rajnandgaon Recruitment 2026 is a district-level hiring drive for 332 contractual posts under the National Health Mission (NHM), Chhattisgarh, as per HR Policy 2018. All posts are purely temporary and will be filled on contract basis through an online application process.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CMHO Rajnandgaon NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for CMHO Rajnandgaon NHM Recruitment 2026 is May 29, 2026 up to 5:00 PM. Applications submitted after the deadline will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are released in CMHO Rajnandgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 332 vacancies have been notified across 22 different posts, including Nursing Officer/Staff Nurse, ANM, Community Health Officer, Pharmacist, Radiographer, MO AYUSH, RMA, Physiotherapist, Audiologist, Secretarial Assistant, MPW (Male), STS, Attendant, and Class IV/Aya Bai/Cook cum Caretaker.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for CMHO Rajnandgaon NHM posts in 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly salary varies by post, ranging from ₹8,800 – ₹8,860 for Attendant/Class IV/Aya Bai/Cook cum Caretaker, to ₹25,000 for MO AYUSH and Audiologist. Nursing Officer/Staff Nurse receive ₹16,000 – ₹16,500, Community Health Officer gets ₹16,500, while Block Manager–Account is paid ₹21,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility and educational qualifications for CMHO Rajnandgaon posts?
faq.answer: Nursing Officer/Staff Nurse: B.Sc Nursing/Post Basic B.Sc Nursing or GNM with valid CG Nursing Council registration. ANM: 12th pass + ANM training + CG Nursing Council registration. Pharmacist: B.Pharma or D.Pharma with CG Pharmacy Council registration. MO AYUSH: BHMS/BAMS/BUMS with valid AYUSH board registration. Other posts require respective degrees/diplomas such as B.Com+PGDCA, BASLP, BPT, Radiography, OT Technician, MPW training, etc., as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for CMHO Rajnandgaon NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years for all applicants. For medical posts, the maximum age is 70 years, while for managerial and other posts, the maximum age is 64 years, calculated as on January 1, 2026. Age relaxations apply as per Chhattisgarh government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CMHO Rajnandgaon NHM posts?
faq.answer: Selection is merit-based and conducted at the district level. First, applications are screened and eligible/ineligible lists are uploaded on the official website. Shortlisted candidates then appear for a Written Test / Computer-Based Test / Clinical Skill Test (depending on the post), and must score at least 30% (6 out of 20 marks) to qualify. The final merit list is prepared by combining academic marks, experience marks, and test scores.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for CMHO Rajnandgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: To apply, visit https://govthealth.cg.gov.in/RecRajnandgaonCont2026, register with your mobile number, and log in using the registration number and password. Fill the online form, upload all required documents, pay the fee via QR code/UPI, and enter the transaction ID. After final submission, take a printout, sign it, and upload the self-signed copy, as applications without this step will be rejected.
